ssmcontacts.rotation.weeklysetting.CfnAb: Information about rotations that recur weekly.

ssmcontacts.rotation.weeklysetting.DayOf.Description: The day of the week when weekly recurring on-call shift rotations begins.
ssmcontacts.rotation.weeklysetting.DayOf.Allowed values: FRI | MON | SAT | SUN | THU | TUE | WED

ssmcontacts.rotation.weeklysetting.HandO.Description: The time of day when a weekly recurring on-call shift rotation begins.
